speaker: Narrator
text: The student body had been given some time to enjoy the Summer. Blanche's mind needed the time to process her feelings. It was the kind of passionate kiss that she had imagined she received on her first night with a woman, it was the taste she had always hoped to get from the bags of premium candy her parents bought  her every Saturday as a child. It came from the most repulsive woman she had ever known. It couldn't be helped.

speaker: Narrator
